description:
Develop a C# Console App named 'SystemDiagnostic' in 'C:\Users\Docker\source\repos' that implements Platform Invocation Services (P/Invoke) to retrieve system data using the kernel32.dll functions GetComputerNameW, GetSystemDirectoryW, GetCurrentProcessId, and GetTickCount64. The application must generate a report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DiagnosticOutput\sysinfo_report.txt' (creating the directory if necessary) using this exact format:

ComputerName: [YourSystemName]
SystemDirectory: [YourSystemPath]
ProcessId: [YourPID]
UptimeMilliseconds: [YourUptime]

The solution must be built in 'Release' configuration and executed to ensure the output file is generated.
